title: Ranunculus polydactyloides
taxonomy: Ranunculus polydactyloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial herb with a distinctive appearance and growth habit. The genus Ranunculus is a group of plants commonly known as buttercups or ranunculuses. Ranunculus polydactyloides is native to western North America. It is closely related to other species in the Ranunculaceae family, such as Ranunculus occidentalis and Ranunculus glaberrimus.

intro: Ranunculus polydactyloides, commonly known as the many-toothed buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues, including inflammation, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
